Text.Page:
Dear ,

There must be a dozen commanders vying for your time at this point, but I have a dilemma.

It involves an old enemy, Thulsa. And it involves the Core, so it's personal for me.

Come to me in Allemantheia as soon as you can, and I'll explain.

—Allemantheia Commander Fraya.

You look well, . Perhaps a little weary, but you're entitled to look a little rough around the edges.

I don't have that luxury. The living embodiment of the Core must appear serene at all times.

That's why secrecy is so important. Even though Thulsa is dead, he still threatens the Core. Make yourself comfortable, and I'll explain.
